intro: Welcome to the life of a Suburban Bandit!
description:
In Raccoon Simulator, you aren't a cute little pet; you're a mischievous, hungry scavenger on a mission. Sheriff and his dog live in a nice house full of shiny objects, tasty sausages, and breakable vases. It's time to break in and turn the house into your playground!

Take on the role of the boldest raccoon in town! What's your goal? Cause as much trouble as possible without getting caught! Sneak through the house, raid the refrigerator, knock over the TV, and drive the dog crazy!

This is a game of pure anarchy. Hide in closets to ambush the residents, steal fish from the aquarium, or simply run wild and destroy the furniture. Nowhere is safe from your tiny, grabby hands, from the backyard to the living room.
